title: CEOs View Trump Tariffs as 'New Normal' Beyond Presidency
detail: Hundreds of corporate executives now believe that tariffs implemented during Trump's presidency will become permanent fixtures of U.S. trade policy, persisting even after Trump leaves office. This represents a significant shift in business planning and expectations around long-term trade policy.

media.caption: Corporate executives increasingly view Trump-era tariffs as permanent policy changes

title: Trump Deletes Jesus Image Amid Vatican Feud
detail: Donald Trump removed a controversial image depicting himself as Jesus from his social media accounts as his public dispute with Pope Francis continues to concern American Catholics. The religious imagery controversy has sparked debate about the intersection of politics and faith in Trump's political movement.

media.caption: Trump's controversial religious imagery sparks concerns among U.S. Catholics
